title: Automation QA Engineer
responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams
requirements_text: We are looking for a middle specialist with hands-on experience in testing, jira, sql, postman, playwright. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: DataBridge is hiring a middle automation qa engineer to support validating product quality through manual and automated testing.
raw_text: Vacancy V050: Automation QA Engineer at DataBridge. Location: Remote. Employment: hybrid. Required experience: 2.6 years. Required skills: testing, jira, sql, postman, playwright, python, java. Optional skills: performance testing, mobile testing. Responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams.
